semantic.role: GitHub issue template for collecting feature requests and enhancement ideas for the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Capturing the problem the user is facing that leads to a feature request
Describing the desired solution in detail
Listing any alternative solutions the user has considered
Providing space for additional context, screenshots, or related information
outOfScope: General questions or discussions not related to new features

English.purpose: This document serves as a structured template for ArchSpine users and contributors to submit feature requests. It ensures that each request includes a clear problem statement, a proposed solution, any alternatives explored, and any extra context needed to evaluate the idea.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience is anyone interacting with the ArchSpine repository – both end-users and developers – who wishes to suggest improvements or new capabilities. The template is used on GitHub Issues and helps maintainers quickly understand the motivation and scope of a proposed feature.
key_takeaways: The template guides users to articulate the problem clearly before proposing a solution.
It encourages consideration of alternative approaches, which can lead to more robust design decisions.
Additional context field allows screenshots and extra details to support the request.
The 'enhancement' label is automatically applied to categorize the issue.
